speaker: speaker1
text: Shall we visit the Summer Palace tomorrow ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Good . I don't want to leave Beijing without visiting it .

speaker: speaker1
text: How far is it from our hotel ?

speaker: speaker1
text: If we start early , do we have some time for Yuanmingyuan ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I think so . We can go there in the afternoon if you like .
